response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in network security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X) or embedded switch firmware development — all essential for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Extensive exposure to Linux, Docker, and system-level development
concerns: No evidence of C programming in embedded or UNIX firmware contexts
No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement
No experience with LAN-switch security features, NETCONF, SNMP, or switch chip SDKs
